title: eryngium foliosum
intro: Eryngium foliosum, also known as leafy sea daisy or sea holly, is a perennial plant species native to the coastal regions of North America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high concentration of sesquiterpenes and flavonoids, which have been shown to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Eryngium foliosum include its potential to alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to support digestive health. Herbal preparations of Eryngium foliosum can be consumed as teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
